description: Paths to Glory Patch 2 (21 August 2024) — Mob Health Regeneration Adjustments, Armor Abilities unlock from T4, Albion Journal rewards updated, UI Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Daggers, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Holy Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: Mob Changes
items: Avalonian Crystal Basilisk no longer regenerates health after the second phase has been triggered

Reduced health regeneration for elite and high-tier veteran mobs: T7 Veteran: 72 → 61; T8 Veteran: 109 → 76; T4 Elite: 111 → 83; T5 Elite: 137 → 103; T6 Elite: 167 → 125; T7 Elite: 241 → 154; T8 Elite: 363 → 190
Mobs no longer regenerate health while invincible
Demonic Harbinger: Forceful Swing damage per tick: 350 → 250; Reckless Swing damage per tick: 400 → 300; Raging Onslaught cast time: 1.35s → 1.5s; Unrelenting Slaughter cast time: 0.65s → 0.75s
Elite Earthkeeper Axe-Thrower: Stun duration no longer scales with mob's ability power or player's crowd control resistance
Respawn chances for T6+ resources and resource mobs affected by Dynamic Spawn Rates increased by up to 10%
sections.searchable_text: Mob Changes Avalonian Crystal Basilisk health regeneration veteran elite T7 T8 T4 T5 T6 invincible Demonic Harbinger Forceful Swing Reckless Swing Raging Onslaught Unrelenting Slaughter Elite Earthkeeper Axe-Thrower Stun duration Dynamic Spawn Rates T6+ respawn

sections.heading: Other Changes and Improvements
items: Armor items now have all their abilities unlocked from Tier 4 upwards (as has been the case with weapons since the Paths to Glory update)

Multiple Albion Journal mission rewards updated: Roaming Mob missions changed from Bags of Silver to Tomes of Insight and Community Tokens; Roads fame missions updated similarly; Champion in Static Dungeons updated
'Defeat 25 T3 Roaming Mobs' objective changed to 'Defeat 12 T3 Roaming Mobs'
Travel Planner and Island Merchant UIs now grouped in a two-level dropdown menu with biome/city icons
Guild UI: Added functionality to copy guild member list as TSV
Claiming a reward from the Albion Journal now automatically opens the Inventory
Dropdowns with submenus now have arrow symbols
System-generated soup, salad, and mules removed from Marketplaces on Albion Europe
Added Guild Logos for Albion Europe Beta Season winners
sections.searchable_text: Armor Abilities unlock Tier 4 weapons Albion Journal mission rewards Roaming Mobs Bags of Silver Tomes of Insight Community Tokens Roads fame Champions Static Dungeons Travel Planner Island Merchant dropdown biome city icons Guild UI member list TSV Journal Inventory Albion Europe soup salad mules Guild Logos Beta Season

Seismic Tremor: 1st and 2nd Hit Damage: 70 → 80; 3rd Hit Damage: 140 → 160

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Generous Heal Cast Time 0.6s 0.5s Range 14m 15m

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Fireflash Orb Hellspawn Staff Initial Damage 150 120 0.6s 30 max 240 Recast 220 150 Seedling's Bloom Empowered Bloom Healing 20% 10% Barbed Roots Shield 150 175

changes.raw_text: Fireflash Orb: Initial Damage: 150 → 120 (every 0.6s the projectile travels, damage increases by 30, up to max 240). Recast Damage: 220 → 150.
notes: Every 0.6s the projectile travels, damage increases by 30, up to a maximum of 240

changes.raw_text: Seedling's Bloom: Empowered Bloom Healing Received: 20% → 10%

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Blind Spot Shoes of Tenacity invisible mobs players only Buff duration 1s 1.5s Movespeed 20% 60%

changes.raw_text: Blind Spot: Caster is no longer invisible to mobs, but only to other players. Buff duration: 1s → 1.5s; Movespeed: 20% → 60%.
notes: Caster is no longer invisible to mobs, but only to other players

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Albion Journal: Multiple mission condition and tracking fixes
UI fixes: Community Tokens crafting default, Territory Control Cost tooltip, Journal achievement popups, two-handed Vanity Item off-hand slot, [Mobile] region map pink display
Fixed issue where a stray Blue Zone Randomized Dungeon would appear in the Roads of Avalon
Fixed issue where Siege Banners could not be raised against a territory that had already been raided
Various additional graphical, animation, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
